what: Trigger a deep LLM audit of the knowledge entry and display structured results
why: Provides actionable quality feedback on token size, LLM-friendliness, tag correctness, uniqueness, and more — with one-click suggestions apply

error_handling.action: Show result with all findings as warn/LLM unavailable — still useful for token count
Return to view step, auditProgressMessage shows error

decisions.reason: Standalone audit separate from edit-save audit
decisions.rationale: The existing post-edit audit (step 'audit') shows EditAuditResults for save warnings. This new step provides deep LLM analysis on demand from the view mode action bar.
